2025-26 San Diego Toreros Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 12-21 (5-13, 11th in WCC MBB)

Coach: Steve Lavin

PS/G: 74.5 (219th of 365)

PA/G: 77.9 (294th of 365)

SRS: -3.83 (205th of 365)

SOS: 2.21 (114th of 365)

ORtg: 106.2 (249th of 365)

DRtg: 111.1 (291st of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +200000
